<!--
  PR TITLE must follow Conventional Commits format — release-please reads it to determine
  the next version and generate the changelog automatically.

  Format:  <type>(<optional scope>): <short description>

  Types:
    feat:     new feature              → bumps MINOR version (v3.0.0 → v3.1.0)
    fix:      bug fix                  → bumps PATCH version (v3.0.0 → v3.0.1)
    feat!:    breaking change          → bumps MAJOR version (v3.0.0 → v4.0.0)
    chore:    maintenance, no release
    refactor: code change, no release
    ci:       CI/CD changes, no release
    docs:     documentation, no release
    test:     tests only, no release

  Examples:
    feat(ota): add rollback confirmation dialog
    fix(webui): brightness slider not persisting after reboot
    chore: update ESP-IDF component versions
-->
